corporate.note: Impuesto a las Ganancias — Sociedades; flat 35% rate on net taxable income

personal_income_tax.note: Progressive 5-35%; MNI thresholds updated annually by AFIP

consumption_tax.note: IVA: 21% general; 10.5% on food staples, medicine, certain construction; 27% on utilities for non-final consumers

provincial_turnover_tax.note: Ingresos Brutos: provincial gross receipts tax; varies by jurisdiction and activity class (1%-5%)

banking_transactions_tax.note: IDCB (Impuesto a los Debitos y Creditos Bancarios); 0.6% on bank debits and credits

inflation_adjustment.note: Ajuste integral por inflacion mandatory; Argentina classified as hyperinflationary economy

social_security.note: Contribuciones patronales: ~26% of gross salary (SIPA + PAMI + obra social)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
